assessment.note: She names last cycle as still occupying her thinking, which signals an unresolved setback mildly blocking growth and clarity.

new_queue.label: Last cycle thread
new_queue.name: When you say 'last cycle' — what part of it is still sticking with you?
new_queue.description: Drills into the unresolved piece of last cycle that is still blocking her.

new_queue.label: Stretch now
new_queue.name: Which part of your current work is actually stretching you right now?
new_queue.description: Distinguishes comfort-zone execution from genuine growth moments.

new_queue.label: Current footing
new_queue.name: What's been most on your mind at work lately, Maria?
new_queue.description: Safe opener that lets Maria set context before any growth topic is introduced.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Principal bar
new_queue.name: What does the next-level bar for Principal look like to you?
new_queue.description: Gets her to name the concrete standard she is aiming at, not a vague aspiration.

new_queue.label: Tradeoffs ahead
new_queue.name: What would you be willing to trade off to make room for the next step?
new_queue.description: Forces a real investment conversation about what has to give for growth to happen.

new_queue.label: Manager support
new_queue.name: What kind of support from me would actually move this forward?
new_queue.description: Makes the ask concrete so the plan turns into manager action, not just reflection.

new_queue.label: Next move
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what is the next step you want to take before we meet again?
new_queue.description: Closes on one concrete commitment that lands the conversation in action.
